purpose: Production evidence-pack and RAG connector registry for Bharat Hyperlocal Dashboard. No synthetic market claims are included here; connectors describe real-world ingestion routes and required validation.

backendContract.auth: Bearer token on backend only. Do not expose vendor API keys in the browser.

confidenceRules.A: Primary source, company filing, official API, or platform-owned public data.
confidenceRules.B: Credible third-party source, established news/reporting, or reputable data provider output.
confidenceRules.C: Directional social/forum/creator signal or vendor/case-study source.
confidenceRules.D: Manual observation, incomplete data, or assumption requiring validation.

connectors.name: Tavily Search/Extract/Research
connectors.notes: Use for discovery and extraction of public web pages. Good first pass for live signal ingestion. Free tier available at tavily.com (1000 searches/month).

connectors.name: Reddit Public JSON API
connectors.notes: FREE — No API key needed. Uses Reddit's public JSON API. Search r/hyderabad, r/india, r/IndianStreetFood for local consumer voice. Treat as directional, not statistically representative.

connectors.name: Google News RSS Feed
connectors.notes: FREE — No API key needed. Uses Google News RSS feed. Good for Indian q-commerce news and expansion announcements.

connectors.name: Google Trends RSS Feed
connectors.notes: FREE — No API key needed. Uses Google Trends RSS feed. Schedule weekly. Normalize interest over time, related queries, and geo interest.

connectors.name: URL Page Fetch
connectors.notes: FREE — No API key needed. Fetches any public URL and extracts text content. Use after discovery when URLs are known.

connectors.name: Firecrawl Scrape/Crawl/Extract
connectors.notes: Use after discovery when URLs are known. Store markdown chunks, screenshots, and extracted JSON in the evidence pack.

connectors.name: Apify Google Trends Actor
connectors.notes: Schedule weekly. Normalize interest over time, related queries, and geo interest.

connectors.name: Google Ads API Keyword Planner
connectors.notes: Use official API rather than scraping Keyword Planner. Requires Google Ads account access.

connectors.name: Reddit API / Apify Reddit Actor
connectors.notes: Store snippets, subreddit, permalink, timestamp, and sentiment. Treat as directional, not statistically representative.

connectors.name: Manual Competitor App Audit
connectors.notes: No public API. Upload screenshots and observations with timestamp, location, device, and account context.

connectors.name: Meta Ad Library / SearchAPI
connectors.notes: Use official Ad Library where possible. Capture ad copy, page, creative URL/thumbnail, active dates, language, and region.

connectors.name: YouTube Data API / Apify YouTube Actor
connectors.notes: Use official YouTube API for search/stats where possible. Store title, channel, views, likes, comments, published date.

connectors.name: Bright Data or Apify Google Maps Scraper
connectors.notes: Use for public Maps listings only. Verify dark-store classification before showing as fact.

connectors.name: App Store / Play Store Review Provider
connectors.provider: Official exports or compliant review API
connectors.notes: Location filtering is only valid if source exposes it. Otherwise label Hyderabad relevance as inferred or unverified.

connectors.name: Public Reports and Filings
connectors.provider: CareEdge, Redseer, Blume, Swiggy/Eternal filings, media reports
connectors.notes: Prefer primary filings and official reports. Third-party blogs can support directional estimates only.

jobs.title: Hyperlocal Demand Proof
queries: Hyderabad quick commerce expansion dark stores

jobs.title: Unit Economics Anchors
queries: Hyderabad food delivery AOV Swiggy earnings

briefPromptTemplate.system: You are a GTM intelligence analyst. Use only supplied evidence chunks. If evidence is weak or absent, say what must be validated. Every recommendation must cite evidence IDs.

sampleEvidence.claim: The dashboard already contains source-backed India quick-commerce metrics and confidence labels.
sampleEvidence.evidence_text: Use data/public_market_data.json and data/market_signals_2025_2026.json as seed evidence until live connectors ingest fresh records.
